_comment_base: Local sentence-transformers checkpoint warm-started for fine-tuning. Downloaded once from HuggingFace, then saved to output_dir for offline loading (DoD #3).
_comment_prefix: nomic-embed-text-v1.5 is trained with task prefixes. Anchors/corpus are documents; held-out variants used as retrieval queries get the query prefix.

eval._comment: Primary DoD gate = distractor MRR/recall@10 (F1-aligned: negatives act as distractors in the retrieval corpus). anchor_bank metrics are a register-invariance diagnostic.
